channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hantavirus strain in deadly outbreak matches known variant, France reports
item.description: Genomic analysis of the virus on the MV Hondius shows no new characteristics so far.

item.title: Trump-backed candidate challenges GOP incumbent in Louisiana
item.description: Incumbent Sen. Bill Cassidy faces Trump-backed Rep. Julia Letlow and John Fleming.

item.title: Death penalty possible in Murdaugh murder retrial, prosecutors say
item.description: South Carolina Attorney General says prosecutors may seek the death penalty.

item.title: Maldives halts search for 4 Italians' remains after diver dies
item.description: The remains are believed to be deep inside an underwater cave.
